# mixpanel_data_group (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String)
- `property_name` (String)

### Optional

- `metadata` (Attributes) Optional metadata blob attached to a data group. Open-ended: callers may
send keys beyond the documented ones (legacy ``additionalProperties: True``). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `project_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number)
- `data_group_id` (String)
- `is_ready` (Boolean)
- `ready_at` (Number)
- `type` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Optional:

- `company_key_name` (String)
- `company_revenue_key` (String)
- `is_company_key` (Boolean)
